TABLE1.NAME: MERCHANT
TABLE1.TEXT: Well-dressed and here on business. Has a shop in town if local, otherwise operates out of a wagon or cart.

TABLE2.NAME: LOST PET
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC has lost a pet and is hoping you might help find it. There might even be a reward.

CARD#1.SECRET: This character is being hunted by a local bounty hunter.
CARD#1.SECRETRULE: If S is 3, it is over a trivial matter. If S is 6, it is for murder. If H is 2, apply the secret.

OTHER1.TEXT: It is over a trivial matter

TRAIT.NAME: STUBBORN
TRAIT.TEXT: This character is unwilling to compromise on any position that is relevant to their role or cause.

TABLE1.NAME: HIDING EVIDENCE
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC has committed or seen a crime and is looking for a place to hide the evidence.

TABLE2.NAME: BOUNTY HUNTER
TABLE2.TEXT: Professional bounty hunter, equipped with manacles, bolas, and rope.

Hunting.1: No one, looking for a job
Hunting.2: No one, looking for a job

CARD#2.SECRET: This NPC secretly wants to quit their current job and become an entertainer. Maybe the PCs can help?
CARD#2.SECRETRULE: If S is 5+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: BAD JOKES
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC has the habit of telling terrible jokes, often including puns.

TABLE1.NAME: BARRISTER
TABLE1.TEXT: A local legal scholar, dressed in fine clothing, carrying a satchel.

Client.6: A PC who is being sued

TABLE2.NAME: NEEDS TO DANCE
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is looking for someone to teach them how to dance for an upcoming event!

CARD#3.SECRET: This character is actually a dragon using powerful magic to disguise themself as an ordinary NPC.
CARD#3.SECRETRULE: If S is 0 and H is 6, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: ALOOF
TRAIT.TEXT: With their head held high, this NPC views everyone around them as their lesser and treats them accordingly.

TABLE1.NAME: LAMPLIGHTER
TABLE1.TEXT: Worker carrying a long pole, wicks, and other tools for lighting and dowsing lanterns.

TABLE2.NAME: SIGHTSEEING
TABLE2.TEXT: There is something interesting here to see and this NPC is on a mission to find it.

CARD#4.SECRET: In truth, this character is dealing with a horrifying family tragedy, and they are not dealing with it well.
CARD#4.SECRETRULE: If H is 6, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: MEAN
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is just unpleasant to be around. They insult and belittle those around them.

TABLE1.NAME: RAT CATCHER
TABLE1.TEXT: Wearing filthy clothes, this NPC is bedecked with traps and dead rats, carrying a cage.

Cage Occupant.6: Creature in the shape of a rat

TABLE2.NAME: HIRING
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is looking to hire a servant or assistant to help them with an important task.

CARD#5.SECRET: This NPC is responsible for a murder and has hidden the body. If H is 2+, it was an accident.
CARD#5.SECRETRULE: If S is 4+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: PARANOID
TRAIT.TEXT: Always on the lookout, this NPC jumps at the slightest noise and is skeptical of everyone's motives.

TABLE1.NAME: COBBLER
TABLE1.TEXT: Crafter of shoes and boots, this NPC is wearing an apron, bedecked with tools.

TABLE2.NAME: ON A DATE
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is waiting for a date to show up, looking around nervously with a small gift or token in hand.

CARD#6.SECRET: This character is selling something and their attitude is there to draw in customers.
CARD#6.SECRETRULE: If H is 2, it's illegal. If S is 3+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: FRIENDLY
TRAIT.TEXT: This character is in a good mood, happily greeting those around them, offering to help as needed.

TABLE1.NAME: LOST SOMETHING
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is looking all around the area for something they have lost. What is it?

TABLE2.NAME: FARRIER
TABLE2.TEXT: Trimming and shoeing horse hooves, this NPC is wearing a leather apron and tool belt.

CARD#7.SECRET: This character recently came into a great deal of wealth.
CARD#7.SECRETRULE: If H is 3, the gold is from an illegal source. If S is 1, apply the secret.

OTHER1.TEXT: The gold is from an illegal source

TRAIT.NAME: HAPPY
TRAIT.TEXT: Although they are mostly keeping to themselves, this NPC is clearly happy, with a smile on their face.

TABLE1.NAME: PORTER
TABLE1.TEXT: Carrying a variety of bags, boxes, or chests, this NPC is dressed in plain, clean clothes.

TABLE2.NAME: SEEKING INSPIRATION
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is looking for stories or works of art to inspire an upcoming creation.

CARD#8.SECRET: This character recently suffered the loss of someone very close to them, using their focus to hide from the pain.
CARD#8.SECRETRULE: If H is 1, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: DETERMINED
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC has their mind set on their goal, and nothing will stand in their way to see the job done.

TABLE1.NAME: TOWN CRIER
TABLE1.TEXT: Standing atop a podium or barrel, this NPC is shouting out the latest news.

TABLE2.NAME: HUNGOVER
TABLE2.TEXT: Be quiet! This NPC has a terrible hangover from a night of overindulgence.

CARD#9.SECRET: This character is actually a serial killer looking for their next victim. They have chosen one of the PCs.
CARD#9.SECRETRULE: If S is 3 and H is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: SHY
TRAIT.TEXT: This character is trying their best to avoid being noticed and is awkward should anyone try to talk to them.

TABLE1.NAME: WAINWRIGHT
TABLE1.TEXT: Crafter that makes and repairs carts and wagons, usually found carrying woodworking tools.

TABLE2.NAME: SEEKING CHARITY
TABLE2.TEXT: With hat in hand, the NPC is looking for donations to support a worthy cause.

CARD#10.SECRET: This character is new to the area and is hoping to make some friends. They really want to fit in with the locals.
CARD#10.SECRETRULE: If H is 3+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: HELPFUL
TRAIT.TEXT: This character jumps to help anyone in need, opening doors, helping with packages, giving directions, etc.

TABLE1.NAME: TAVERN BARD
TABLE1.TEXT: Dressed for a performance, this bard is carrying an instrument and wearing a big hat.

TABLE2.NAME: PUZZLED
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is busy trying to solve a puzzle or riddle. The real question is why?

CARD#11.SECRET: This NPC is actually broke, but they are desperately trying to keep up appearances.
CARD#11.SECRETRULE: If S is 1 and H is 5+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: BRAGGART
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC has wealth and they flaunt it. They wear nice clothes, eat fine foods, and travel in luxury.

TABLE1.NAME: INNKEEPER
TABLE1.TEXT: Offers up a place to sleep for weary travelers and adventurers.

TABLE2.NAME: PLOTTING A CRIME
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is up to no good, preparing to commit a crime in the near future.

CARD#12.SECRET: Their kindness is a facade, forced on them by a powerful spell as a form of punishment for living a wicked life.
CARD#12.SECRETRULE: If H is 6, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: KIND
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is just genuinely a good person. They go out of their way to help neighbors and strangers alike.

TABLE1.NAME: FISHER
TABLE1.TEXT: Carrying a pole and a bucket, this NPC has caught something fresh

TABLE2.NAME: TRAINING A PET
TABLE2.TEXT: Accompanied by a less than tame animal, this NPC is trying to teach it a new trick.

CARD#13.SECRET: This character belonged to a knightly order in their younger days, but they do not like to talk about why they left.
CARD#13.SECRETRULE: If H is 3+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: RELIABLE
TRAIT.TEXT: This character keeps their word and is always on time. If they offer help or aid, you can be sure they will deliver.

TABLE1.NAME: SAILOR
TABLE1.TEXT: Dressed to be out on the open waters, this NPC is in town for business or on leave.

TABLE2.NAME: SEEKING TREASURE
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is trying to follow a map that supposedly leads to a great treasure.

CARD#14.SECRET: This character is actually a thief, looking for an easy victim to rob. They do not want to rob the PCs, who they view as dangerous.
CARD#14.SECRETRULE: If S is 1, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: DISMISSIVE
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC does not have time for any of the PCs' nonsense, dismissing them and their concerns without consideration.

TABLE1.NAME: ACTOR
TABLE1.TEXT: Member of a local company, this actor is rehearsing for their next performance.

TABLE2.NAME: RESEARCHING
TABLE2.TEXT: Wandering the area asking various questions, this NPC is performing important research.

CARD#15.SECRET: This character accidentally hurt someone as part of their role, and they have not learned to live with the guilt.
CARD#15.SECRETRULE: If H is 2, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: NERVOUS
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is on edge, fidgeting and jumping at loud noises. Their constant alertness makes others uncomfortable.

TABLE1.NAME: SERVER
TABLE1.TEXT: Working at a bar or restaurant, this NPC is frequently overworked and underpaid.

TABLE2.NAME: LOITERING
TABLE2.TEXT: Why are they standing around?

CARD#16.SECRET: This character is secretly gathering information about a specific person or subject. They might have been hired to do it or have their own secret plan.
CARD#16.SECRETRULE: If H is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: EMPATHETIC
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC genuinely cares about the feelings and well-being of others, going out of their way to put others at ease.

TABLE1.NAME: CHANDLER
TABLE1.TEXT: Wearing a leather apron, this NPC works with hot wax making candles.

TABLE2.NAME: COLLECTING
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is wandering around trying to collect something strange.

CARD#17.SECRET: In truth, this NPC is a perfectly ordinary, law-abiding person who just happens to have an evil air about them.
CARD#17.SECRETRULE: If S is 3+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: SINISTER
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC's voice and mannerisms make others feel uneasy around them. They seem dangerous or perhaps even evil.

TABLE1.NAME: UNDERTAKER
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC prepares bodies for burial or other religious rites. They often work with local temples.

TABLE2.NAME: WASTING TIME
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is wasting time, waiting for some other activity to start.

CARD#18.SECRET: All of their schemes seem grandiose, but in reality, they are just trying to accomplish something ridiculous, like stealing the neighbor's cat.
CARD#18.SECRETRULE: If H is 4, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: CONNIVING
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC always has a plan or scheme that they are working on; to get rich, seek fame, or otherwise garner power.

TABLE1.NAME: FARMER
TABLE1.TEXT: Most farmers are found working their fields or selling crops in town.

TABLE2.NAME: DELIVERING
TABLE2.TEXT: Carrying a bag, box, or other parcel, this NPC is making a delivery, probably related to their role.

CARD#19.SECRET: This NPC is related to someone famous or a historical figure who does not have the best reputation in town.
CARD#19.SECRETRULE: If S is 2, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: HONEST
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC does not lie and they treat others fairly in all dealings.

TABLE1.NAME: RANCHER
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC spends most of their time herding, feeding, and caring for their animals.

TABLE2.NAME: BACK AND FORTH
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is either going to their job or coming home from it. They are in a hurry, but they have a problem.

CARD#20.SECRET: This NPC secretly an investigator for the local government, asked to look into the PCs for an alleged crime.
CARD#20.SECRETRULE: If S is 5 and H is 5+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: PERCEPTIVE
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC has a keen eye for detail and is able to make astute observations based on that insight.

TABLE1.NAME: TRAPPER
TABLE1.TEXT: Just in from the wild, this NPC traps animals to sell their fur or scales.

TABLE2.NAME: MESSAGE FOR YOU
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is on their way to deliver an important message, via word, letter, or deed.

CARD#21.SECRET: In reality, this character only does their job when being observed by their boss. The moment they are alone, they stop working and relax.
CARD#21.SECRETRULE: If H is 2, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: EFFICIENT
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is incredibly skilled at their job, performing it efficiently and with practiced ease.

TABLE1.NAME: RESEARCHER
TABLE1.TEXT: Whether for their own curiosity, or that of a patron, this NPC is trying to learn something.

TABLE2.NAME: UNEMPLOYED
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is unemployed but hoping to find a job soon. They might even be looking to change professions.

CARD#22.SECRET: This character is actually a doppleganger, trying to avoid notice as they hunt for their next victim.
CARD#22.SECRETRULE: If S is 3 and H is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: VERSATILE
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC will take on any challenge and is skilled in multiple fields. Draw an additional role card for this NPC.

TABLE1.NAME: CHILD CARE
TABLE1.TEXT: Either with intent or absent-mindedly, this NPC is looking after one of their young children.

TABLE2.NAME: CON ARTIST
TABLE2.TEXT: Selling something that is too good to be true, this NPC is trying to scam the locals and the PCs.

CARD#23.SECRET: They are secretly very judgemental about the actions of others, keeping a book of grudges and slights.
CARD#23.SECRETRULE: If H is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: APOLOGETIC
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC apologizes for almost everything, from they way they're dressed to any possible slight.

TABLE1.NAME: SERVANT
TABLE1.TEXT: Working for a wealthy patron, this NPC is finely dressed and ready to aid their client.

TABLE2.NAME: WALK THE PET
TABLE2.TEXT: Pets need exercise too and this NPC is taking one of their pets for a walk.

CARD#24.SECRET: This character was an adventurer some years ago, but the trials of that life left them broken. They sometimes remember small details and events.
CARD#24.SECRETRULE: If H is 3+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: FORGETFUL
TRAIT.TEXT: Constantly forgetting names, dates, and locations, this NPC has poor short-term memory.

TABLE1.NAME: PACKING
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is preparing for a long journey by packing and buying supplies. Where are they going?

TABLE2.NAME: COOK
TABLE2.TEXT: Wearing a food-stained apron, this NPC often smells of their latest culinary specialty.

CARD#25.SECRET: Being on the run can be taxing, and this NPC has been on the move for weeks now without rest. They're looking for a place to lay low for a while.
CARD#25.SECRETRULE: If S is 4, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: DISTRACTED
TRAIT.TEXT: Focusing on something else entirely, this NPC is having a hard time paying attention to the situation.

TABLE1.NAME: STUDENT
TABLE1.TEXT: Attending an academy or serving as an apprentice, this NPC is often found studying their craft.

TABLE2.NAME: STUDYING
TABLE2.TEXT: With their nose buried in a book, this NPC is studying up on an important topic.

CARD#26.SECRET: A terrible curse was placed on this NPC years ago for a personal slight and they've been clumsy ever since.
CARD#26.SECRETRULE: If S is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: CLUMSY
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC frequently trips, drops objects, and knocks things over.

TABLE1.NAME: TUTOR
TABLE1.TEXT: Usually found teaching a student, this NPC is useful in teaching new skills (draw 1 trait for the student).

TABLE2.NAME: GHOST HUNTING
TABLE2.TEXT: Did you see that? This NPC is looking for a ghost that they saw in the vicinity. What did it look like?

CARD#27.SECRET: When not performing their normal role, this NPC is a secret advisor to a powerful local, helping them craft their next move.
CARD#27.SECRETRULE: If S is 5 and H is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: ARGUMENTATIVE
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC enjoys a good debate, but they do so even when the situation does not call for it.

TABLE1.NAME: VAGRANT
TABLE1.TEXT: This homeless NPC can often be found looking for simple work or trying to find a place to sleep.

TABLE2.NAME: LEARNING TO FLY
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is trying to learn how to fly and is about to jump off a tall structure. What method are they employing?

CARD#28.SECRET: This character is far older than they appear, having achieved a great age through magic or some aspect of their ancestry.
CARD#28.SECRETRULE: If S is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: PATIENT
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is more than happy to wait their turn or to allow events to unfold before making a decision.

TABLE1.NAME: ADVENTURER
TABLE1.TEXT: Always headed out on the next quest, this adventurer is a skilled spellcaster.

TABLE2.NAME: PAY ME!
TABLE2.TEXT: With shouts and pleas, this NPC is demanding to be paid for past goods or services.

CARD#29.SECRET: When they were young, this NPC believes they caused a bad thing to happen due to their poor decision. They don't know it wasn't their fault.
CARD#29.SECRETRULE: If H is 5, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: UNSURE
TRAIT.TEXT: Lacking confidence, this NPC second-guesses every decision they make, often changing their mind at least once.

TABLE1.NAME: RENDEZVOUS
TABLE1.TEXT: Biding their time, this NPC is waiting to meet someone at this location.

TABLE2.NAME: ADVENTURER
TABLE2.TEXT: Always headed out on the next quest, this adventurer is a skilled warrior.

CARD#30.SECRET: A family member is desperately looking for this NPC.
CARD#30.SECRETRULE: If S is 1, it's a dangerous outsider who plans to kidnap the NPC to another plane. If H is 3, apply the secret.

OTHER1.TEXT: It's a dangerous outsider who plans to kidnap the npc to another plane

TRAIT.NAME: BORING
TRAIT.TEXT: There just is not much that is very interesting about this NPC. They dress plainly and don't have much to say.

TABLE1.NAME: ADVENTURER
TABLE1.TEXT: Always headed out on the next quest, this adventurer is an expert in skills and combat.

TABLE2.NAME: BLENDING IN
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is trying to blend in with the locals, but a careful inspection reveals they're an outsider.

CARD#31.SECRET: With bloody vengeance in mind, this NPC is on the hunt for a character whose description includes their fixation.
CARD#31.SECRETRULE: If H is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: FIXATED
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is transfixed by a specific personal detail (tattoo, eye color, mole pattern, etc.), asking about it all the time.

TABLE1.NAME: BUREAUCRAT
TABLE1.TEXT: Collecting taxes, delivering notices, and approving contracts, this NPC is vital in keeping a town moving.

TABLE2.NAME: PASSING THRU
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is passing through the area, just one stop on a long journey.

CARD#32.SECRET: The folk of this town have come to despise this NPC, calling them rude and insulting. There is talk of trying to drive them out of town.
CARD#32.SECRETRULE: If H is 0, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: IMPATIENT
TRAIT.TEXT: Delays of any kind infuriate this NPC and they become rude if anyone wastes their valuable time.

TABLE1.NAME: EVENT PLANNING
TABLE1.TEXT: Wandering the area, this NPC is looking to see if this place is suitable for an upcoming event?

TABLE2.NAME: CULTIST
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is dressed like everyone else, but they have a hidden symbol under their clothes.

CARD#33.SECRET: In reality, this character is actually an expert, but they're pretending to be less experienced as bait to identify those who might take advantage of them.
CARD#33.SECRETRULE: If S is 2+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: INEXPERIENCED
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC does not seem to have much skill or experience in their chosen career or current endeavor.

TABLE1.NAME: GUARD
TABLE1.TEXT: Wearing light armor and carrying weapons, this NPC bears an insignia showing their rank and organization.

TABLE2.NAME: RELAXING
TABLE2.TEXT: After a long day of work, this NPC is just trying to relax, indulging in a simple pleasure.

CARD#34.SECRET: The NPC is actually a hag in disguise, living amongst the people, looking for their next victim.
CARD#34.SECRETRULE: If H is 0, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: TOO SWEET
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC has a cloying saccharine attitude toward everyone, talking to them as if they were innocent children.

TABLE1.NAME: MONEY LENDER
TABLE1.TEXT: Preying upon the poor and desperate, the NPC lends money at exorbitant rates.

TABLE2.NAME: OUT FOR REVENGE
TABLE2.TEXT: Someone has wronged this NPC, and they're planning their revenge!

CARD#35.SECRET: This NPC is just trying to break in a new pair of shoes, and it's causing them no end of discomfort (or some other similar personal nuisance).
CARD#35.SECRETRULE: If H is 4+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: FOUL MOOD
TRAIT.TEXT: With a pessimistic attitude about everything, this NPC is in a foul mood and just wants to go home.

TABLE1.NAME: DANCER
TABLE1.TEXT: Dressed in light, flowing clothes, this NPC always has a spring in their step, on their way to the next performance.

TABLE2.NAME: HAVING A MEAL
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC wants nothing more than to finish their meal in peace.

CARD#36.SECRET: In truth, this NPC is serving as a distraction while a crime is being committed in the area. Most likely, pickpockets are working the crowd.
CARD#36.SECRETRULE: If H is 1, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: GREGARIOUS
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is here to have a good time and to make sure you do too! They buy drinks, sing songs, and join in the fun.

TABLE1.NAME: SINGER
TABLE1.TEXT: With a tune on their lips, this performer is dressed to draw attention, heading to their next performance.

TABLE2.NAME: SHOPPING
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is perusing the local stalls, buying common goods for their household.

CARD#37.SECRET: The NPC is carrying something of value in their backpack.
CARD#37.SECRETRULE: If S is 4, it's worth over 100 gold. If S is 4 and H is 3, it's something special, like a mysterious glowing egg or a talking sword. If S is 3+, apply the secret.

OTHER2.TEXT: It's something special, like a mysterious glowing egg or a talking sword

TRAIT.NAME: PROTECTIVE
TRAIT.TEXT: Above all else, this NPC is being very guarded, going out of their way to avoid confrontation.

TABLE1.NAME: MUSICIAN
TABLE1.TEXT: With their instrument in hand, this NPC is tuning, practicing, and getting ready to put on a show.

TABLE2.NAME: SHOPPING
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is out looking to purchase gear and equipment for an adventure!

CARD#38.SECRET: This NPC is being controlled by another creature that is trying to blend in, but not doing a particularly good job.
CARD#38.SECRETRULE: If H is 3 or less, it has an evil intent. If S is 1, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: ILLEIST
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC always refers to themselves in the third person.

TABLE1.NAME: POET
TABLE1.TEXT: Often found with a sheaf of scrolls tucked under one arm, this NPC is working on their next masterpiece.

TABLE2.NAME: TRAINING A SKILL
TABLE2.TEXT: Working with a tutor, this NPC is trying to improve a particular skill.

CARD#39.SECRET: This character is secretly an angel, traveling from the higher planes on a sacred quest and nothing can stand in their way.
CARD#39.SECRETRULE: If S is 3 and H is 6, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: RESILIENT
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC does not back down from hardship, facing down challenges and setbacks in pursuit of their goal.

TABLE1.NAME: STORYTELLER
TABLE1.TEXT: Keeper of local lore, this NPC will happily tell stories to any who will listen, often at just the right time.

TABLE2.NAME: EXERCISING
TABLE2.TEXT: The only thing this NPC is interested in right now is completing their workout regimen.

CARD#40.SECRET: Local businesses cater to the whims of this NPC, all the while overcharging them and giving them shoddy service.
CARD#40.SECRETRULE: If S is 2 or less, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: SELF-CENTERED
TRAIT.TEXT: Whatever you are doing is not important to this NPC. It is all about them and their needs.

TABLE1.NAME: GUILD MEMBER
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC specializes in an important local craft, proudly wearing the badge of a local guild.

TABLE2.NAME: TAKING A STROLL
TABLE2.TEXT: Just out for a walk, this NPC is wandering from place to place, lost in thought.

CARD#41.SECRET: This character has a very dark past that they have tried hard to put behind them. They've spent years working on being a better person, but someone knows what they did and seeks justice.
CARD#41.SECRETRULE: If H is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: TRUSTWORTHY
TRAIT.TEXT: Everyone in the community trusts this individual as a pillar of honesty and fair dealings.

TABLE1.NAME: MISCREANT
TABLE1.TEXT: Wanted by the local watch, this NPC has no qualms with breaking the law if it serves their goal.

TABLE2.NAME: WORKING
TABLE2.TEXT: To put it simply, this NPC is working at their job with complete focus.

CARD#42.SECRET: After retiring from the life of an adventurer, this NPC swore off violence, but they have one last quest that they need to see accomplished.
CARD#42.SECRETRULE: If S is 0, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: GENTLE
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC has a very caring, delicate nature. They refuse to harm another creature if they can avoid it.

TABLE1.NAME: CLEANING UP
TABLE1.TEXT: This place is a mess. The NPC is busy tidying or cleaning the area.

TABLE2.NAME: JUGGLER
TABLE2.TEXT: Usually found performing for money, this NPC is adept at juggling all manner of objects.

CARD#43.SECRET: Someone has poisoned this NPC and it is only a matter of time before they collapse or hurt themselves.
CARD#43.SECRETRULE: If H is 0, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: OUT OF CONTROL
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is behaving erratically. They might be drunk, under the influence of a spell, or just having a bad day.

TABLE1.NAME: EMISSARY
TABLE1.TEXT: Based on their dress and mannerisms, this NPC is from a foreign land, here on a diplomatic errand.

TABLE2.NAME: PRACTICING MAGIC
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is trying to sound out magic phrases, maybe even attempting to cast a spell.

CARD#44.SECRET: This NPC is secretly from an entirely different social class, trying to blend in to this situation. If S is 0, they are here for nefarious purposes.
CARD#44.SECRETRULE: If H is 6, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: AWKWARD
TRAIT.TEXT: Greeting everyone with a shy smile and broken pleasantries, this NPC just looks uncomfortable in this setting.

TABLE1.NAME: SCRIBE
TABLE1.TEXT: With ink-stained fingers, this NPC can often be found reading or transcribing an important work.

TABLE2.NAME: ASLEEP AT WORK
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is clearly taking a nap at work, either asleep at their post or curled up nearby.

CARD#45.SECRET: There is a fiend hunting this NPC, and it's the only thing they fear. It preys upon the brave and feasts upon breaking them.
CARD#45.SECRETRULE: If S is 2 and H is 5, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: BRAVE
TRAIT.TEXT: Willing to face down any danger, this NPC does not shy away from conflict if they believe it's the right thing to do.

TABLE1.NAME: SHARPENING
TABLE1.TEXT: With a sharp tool or weapon in hand, this NPC is carefully sharpening the edge with a whetstone.

TABLE2.NAME: FALCONER
TABLE2.TEXT: Training birds of prey for sport and hunting, this NPC often wears a heavy leather glove.

CARD#46.SECRET: This NPC has a friend who is in trouble with the law, and they're currently helping their friend avoid capture.
CARD#46.SECRETRULE: If S is 0, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: LOYAL
TRAIT.TEXT: True friends know this NPC to be a trusting and honorable companion, standing by them in times of need.

TABLE1.NAME: BARBER
TABLE1.TEXT: Performing shaves, cuts, and minor surgeries, this NPC is at least trained in medicine.

TABLE2.NAME: WHISTLING
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is going about their business, whistling a catchy tune.

Tune.5: Hard to say, they're bad at it
Tune.6: Hard to say, they're bad at it

CARD#47.SECRET: This character is visiting from a far away place, using magic to speak and read the local language. Unfortunately, that magic has failed and they cannot communicate with anyone.
CARD#47.SECRETRULE: If H is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: CONFUSED
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC appears to be lost, unable to follow directions, and does not appear to know anyone in the area.

TABLE1.NAME: HERBALIST
TABLE1.TEXT: Using rare herbs and local plants, this NPC can cure all manner of ailments.

TABLE2.NAME: PRACTICING MUSIC
TABLE2.TEXT: Clearly not a professional, this NPC is trying to learn how to play an instrument.

CARD#48.SECRET: This NPC is actually a very powerful member of a secret organization. Making them mad is a very bad idea, likely to draw a deadly response.
CARD#48.SECRETRULE: If H is 5, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: DEMANDING
TRAIT.TEXT: Treating everyone like their personal servant, this NPC demands that everyone bow to their whims.

TABLE1.NAME: JOB INTERVIEW
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is in the middle of or on their way to a job interview. Draw another role for the job.

TABLE2.NAME: LOCKSMITH
TABLE2.TEXT: A highly specialized crafter, this NPC makes all manner of locks and often sells the tools to pick them.

CARD#49.SECRET: An encounter with a deadly creature a few years ago gave this NPC a new-found appreciation for life. Unfortunately, the creature is still hunting them.
CARD#49.SECRETRULE: If S is 6, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: ENERGETIC
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is always on the move and never seems to tire. They are always up for another adventure.

TABLE1.NAME: BLACKSMITH
TABLE1.TEXT: Spending all day at a forge gives this NPC an impressive physique and plenty of small cuts and burns.

TABLE2.NAME: PLAYTIME
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is in the middle of a game with 1d3 children, laughing and having fun.

CARD#50.SECRET: This NPC is not actually skilled at their job or position, but they're compensating for it by being loud and overly expressive.
CARD#50.SECRETRULE: If H is 5, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: LOUD
TRAIT.TEXT: You can always hear this NPC coming. Their voice carries easily, cutting through nearly any background din.

TABLE1.NAME: JEWELER
TABLE1.TEXT: Often found wearing goggles to help them see fine details, this NPC makes all manner of jewelry.

TABLE2.NAME: PLAYING A GAME
TABLE2.TEXT: Sitting with a friend, this NPC is playing a game, perhaps even for a small wager.

CARD#51.SECRET: This character is carrying a virulent plague that is about to spread throughout the community.
CARD#51.SECRETRULE: If S is 4+ and H is 1, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: SICK
TRAIT.TEXT: Sniffling and coughing, this NPC is clearly not well. They should probably be at home in bed.

TABLE1.NAME: ALCHEMIST
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC specializes in making potions or alchemical items. They often smell of their ingredients.

TABLE2.NAME: TELLING A TALE
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is being followed around by a bard or scribe who is recording a tale they're in the middle of telling.

CARD#52.SECRET: Guilty over their great wealth and how they acquired it, this NPC is trying to make amends for their past misdeeds.
CARD#52.SECRETRULE: If H is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: GENEROUS
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is giving with their wealth, buying meals for friends, helping the poor, and supporting their family.

TABLE1.NAME: COOPER
TABLE1.TEXT: Wearing a leather apron and carrying wood-working tools, this NPC makes barrels for a living.

TABLE2.NAME: CELEBRATING
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is out having a good time, celebrating a special event or achievement.

CARD#53.SECRET: This NPC has lost everything. Their home was consumed in a blaze that took the lives of their loved ones.
CARD#53.SECRETRULE: If S is 5+, it was not an accident. If H is 2, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: SAD
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is just not in a good mood. They have suffered a loss or got into a heated argument with a friend.

TABLE1.NAME: STREET COOK
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC operates a small street cart, selling fresh food or local treats to those in town.

TABLE2.NAME: ARRESTED
TABLE2.TEXT: The local guard has taken this NPC into custody, hauling them to jail or the nearby stocks.

CARD#54.SECRET: After a dangerous past, this NPC accepted their current role instead of facing the consequences. One day, there might be a reckoning and they might turn to the PCs for help.
CARD#54.SECRETRULE: If H is 4, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: SELF-ASSURED
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC works with practiced ease. They are at peace with their lot in life and are not afraid to own their mistakes.

TABLE1.NAME: TOY MAKER
TABLE1.TEXT: Wearing brightly colored clothing, this NPC makes wooden toys and games for children.

TABLE2.NAME: HEALER NEEDED
TABLE2.TEXT: With desperation in their voice, this NPC is wandering about, looking for a healer.

CARD#55.SECRET: Either through dreams or other divine signs, this NPC has been chosen to carry out some grand design on behalf of their deity. They bear a mark to prove it.
CARD#55.SECRETRULE: If S is 2 and H is 2+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: GODLY
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is a firm believer in their deity's cause, working in every way possible to make their will manifest.

TABLE1.NAME: TAILOR
TABLE1.TEXT: With a measuring tape around their neck and scissors in their belt, this NPC is clearly a tailor.

TABLE2.NAME: ON BREAK
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is on break from their normal job, relaxing outside or behind the building before returning to work.

CARD#56.SECRET: This NPC just got away with a crime and they are pretty sure that no one knows they were involved. If H is 0, it was murder.
CARD#56.SECRETRULE: If S is 2, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: CHEERY
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is just in a good mood, greeting everyone with enthusiasm, with a smile beaming on their face.

TABLE1.NAME: BREWER
TABLE1.TEXT: Smelling of hops and yeast, this NPC brews beers, ales, and maybe even liquor for a living.

TABLE2.NAME: RUNNING LATE
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is in quite a hurry, making their way to an appointment and they have no time to spare.

CARD#57.SECRET: There is a pickpocket who has targeted this NPC and is about to rob them. They might be oblivious, but the PCs might see this crime take place.
CARD#57.SECRETRULE: If H is 4, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: OBLIVIOUS
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC has no idea what is going on around them, missing obvious commotions and anyone talking to them.

TABLE1.NAME: PIRATE
TABLE1.TEXT: Dressed for the open sea, this NPC spends their time plundering other vessels for profit.

TABLE2.NAME: WAITING IN LINE
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is patiently waiting their turn to get into a business or to be served.

CARD#58.SECRET: There are terrible rumors spreading around town about the PCs and this NPC does not think very highly of them as a result.
CARD#58.SECRETRULE: If H is 4+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: UNFRIENDLY
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is in no mood to talk or get to know anyone. They are unhelpful, giving curt answers to questions.

TABLE1.NAME: BUTCHER
TABLE1.TEXT: Wearing a blood-stained apron, this NPC is skilled at preparing various cuts of meat.

TABLE2.NAME: FOUND OBJECT
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC has found a thing on the ground nearby and is trying to return it to its owner.

CARD#59.SECRET: Staying up late to participate in a secret society is taking its toll on this NPC. They have another clandestine meeting scheduled tonight.
CARD#59.SECRETRULE: If H is 1, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: TIRED
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is exhausted. They would like to go home and get some rest, but they have to finish their task.

TABLE1.NAME: HERMIT
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC exists on the fringe of society, preferring to live alone, relying only on themselves.

TABLE2.NAME: PANICKED
TABLE2.TEXT: Something has got this NPC truly frightened and they've taken to the streets to find help.

CARD#60.SECRET: This NPC is being manipulated by a close friend or relative into doing something illegal. They know it's wrong, but they are going to do it anyway.
CARD#60.SECRETRULE: If S is 2+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: WEAK-WILLED
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is unable to control their impulses and is easily cajoled by others into acting against their interests.

TABLE1.NAME: BANDIT
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC makes a living off robbing travelers on the road. In town, they are seen spending their stolen coin.

TABLE2.NAME: HUNGRY
TABLE2.TEXT: Depending on the setting, this NPC is either enjoying a meal or out in search for food.

CARD#61.SECRET: This character overheard a rumor about a local noble or merchant that claims they're looking to buy a dragon to raise as a pet and will pay handsomely for the beast.
CARD#61.SECRETRULE: If S is 6, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: TALKATIVE
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC loves to make small talk about the weather, local politics, and gossip. They never shut up.

TABLE1.NAME: RANGER
TABLE1.TEXT: Spending most of their time in the wilderness, this NPC keeps the area safe for travelers and locals.

TABLE2.NAME: HELPING OUT
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is spending their time helping out a worthy cause.

CARD#62.SECRET: This character is at the center of a controversy or scandal that's about to come to light and working with them will be key in getting to the bottom of it.
CARD#62.SECRETRULE: If S is 5+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: OBNOXIOUS
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is unpleasant to be around. They might have bad odor, talk over people, or just belittle perceived lessers.

TABLE1.NAME: LOGGER
TABLE1.TEXT: Wearing rugged clothing, this NPC is quite skilled with the woodcutting axe strapped to their back.

TABLE2.NAME: WHITTLING
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is working diligently with a small carving knife, creating a sculpture from wood.

CARD#63.SECRET: In reality, this NPC is trying to save as much as they can to pay for a spell to bring a loved one back to life.
CARD#63.SECRETRULE: If S is 4, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: STINGY
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC constantly haggles for a better price and never spends coin unless they have to.

TABLE1.NAME: WITCH/WARLOCK
TABLE1.TEXT: Living on the outskirts, this NPC sells charms, poisons, curses and cures.

TABLE2.NAME: SELLING SOMETHING
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is looking to sell something to the PCs for a very reasonable price.

CARD#64.SECRET: Their stern, dangerous attitude is all a facade. If challenged by anyone willing to stand up for themselves, they flee from the scene immediately.
CARD#64.SECRETRULE: If S is 2+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: RUTHLESS
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC will do anything to secure victory, including intimidation or violence if the problem calls for it.

TABLE1.NAME: WORKING HARD
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is very busy working their job and not interested in idle chat or distractions.

TABLE2.NAME: EXPLORER
TABLE2.TEXT: Dressed for travel, this NPC can often be found studying maps or planning their next expedition.

CARD#65.SECRET: This character is living a double life, with two families, two jobs, and two sets of friends. They are just barely keeping it together.
CARD#65.SECRETRULE: If S is 2, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: UNRELIABLE
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is always late, rarely keeps their word, and frequently cancels plans at the last moment.

TABLE1.NAME: PILGRIM
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is on a journey to visit a special site that is sacred to their faith, and carries religious texts and symbols.

TABLE2.NAME: HARDLY WORKING
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is slacking off at their job, putting in only the bare minimum effort.

CARD#66.SECRET: This NPC is the leader of a small group looking to overthrow the local government, wanting to install themselves as the new rulers.
CARD#66.SECRETRULE: If S is 2 and H is 6, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: OPEN-MINDED
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is willing to hear out other ideas, even if they challenge their own. They are fair and considerate to others.

TABLE1.NAME: PETTY NOBLE
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is technically a member of the nobility, but only just barely.

TABLE2.NAME: ESCORTING A FRIEND
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is showing a friend around town, seeing the sights, getting food, and visiting locals.

CARD#67.SECRET: A rival is planning the downfall of this NPC by humiliating them in a very public way. They plan to strike soon.
CARD#67.SECRETRULE: If H is 2, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: CONFIDENT
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is clearly assured of their own skill, but they know their limits and do not take unnecessary risks.

TABLE1.NAME: CHASE!
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is being chased by another character who is about to catch up with them.

TABLE2.NAME: NOBLE
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is a noble with some amount of power and influence in the local government.

CARD#68.SECRET: This NPC is madly in love with someone that is above their station, probably a noble. Although the feeling is mutual, they believe that they can never be together. Maybe the PCs can help?
CARD#68.SECRETRULE: If S is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: WITTY
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is a master of subtle jabs and jokes, making comical observations about the world around them.

TABLE1.NAME: ROYAL
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is either the local ruler or a member of the royal family. They are accompanied by guards and servants.

TABLE2.NAME: LEAVING A NOTE
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is in the middle of leaving a note on a wall or post for messages.

CARD#69.SECRET: This NPC had their memory erased quite recently by someone who wanted to make sure they did not remember something they saw.
CARD#69.SECRETRULE: If S is 0 and H is 4, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: INNOCENT
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC has a innocence about them. They are not cynical about the world, seeing it with wonder and excitement.

TABLE1.NAME: MOURNER
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is dressed for a funeral and is paid to attend them and weep for the departed.

TABLE2.NAME: HAGGLING
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is current bargaining with another character over the price of some deal.

CARD#70.SECRET: This NPC is planning a surprise party for a close friend, and they're trying to make sure that no one spoils the celebration.
CARD#70.SECRETRULE: If S is 5, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: SECRETIVE
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC takes reasonable precautions to ensure that others do not overhear their business or conversations.

TABLE1.NAME: DRUID
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC spends most of their time in nature, looking after the plants and animals that dwell in their domain.

TABLE2.NAME: PICKING UP
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is here to pick up an item (related to the location) and they are in a hurry.

CARD#71.SECRET: Not only do they lie, but they cheat and steal as well. Change their alignment to chaotic evil.
CARD#71.SECRETRULE: If H is 0, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: LIAR
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC sees no reason to tell the truth if lying will benefit them in any way. They sometimes lie for fun.

TABLE1.NAME: MAGE
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is known for being skilled in the mystic arts, and those with magical troubles seek them out for aid.

TABLE2.NAME: GUARDS!
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is calling out for the local guards or watch to help them with an urgent problem.

CARD#72.SECRET: Locals assume this NPC is hiding something, that no one can be that nice, but they are mistaken. This is just a honest, good person.
CARD#72.SECRETRULE: If H is 2+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: PLEASANT
TRAIT.TEXT: There is just something about this NPC that makes them a joy to be around. They are kind, witty, and warm.

TABLE1.NAME: WEAPON TRAINING
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is learning to use a weapon, either from a trainer or by themselves.

TABLE2.NAME: PATHFINDER
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is a member of the Pathfinder organization. Why are they here?

CARD#73.SECRET: This NPC just has a lot on their mind right now, ever since they learned that a close family member has gone missing in the nearby ruins.
CARD#73.SECRETRULE: If S is 4, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: INEFFICIENT
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC just takes longer to do just about everything. They are not even methodical, just slow and disorganized.

TABLE1.NAME: HABERDASHER
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC spends most of their time making and selling various types of hats.

TABLE2.NAME: HAPPY CUSTOMER
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is currently a happy customer at a local establishment. They are happy to give a recommendation.

CARD#74.SECRET: This NPC is part of a religious cult that is trying to undermine all other faiths and beliefs. They openly scorn all other religions.
CARD#74.SECRETRULE: If H is 0, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: NARROW-MINDED
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is not a fan of change, and they constantly complain that things used to be better in some distant past.

TABLE1.NAME: GARDENER
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC works to help the locals maintain healthy, productive gardens.

TABLE2.NAME: ELDER CARE
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is spending time with an elder from the community.

CARD#75.SECRET: This NPC is actually an outsider from another plane of existence, looking for someone who is perfect in their chosen field, hoping that they might be able to solve some ancient problem.
CARD#75.SECRETRULE: If S is 6 and H is 1, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: CRITICAL
TRAIT.TEXT: Looking at everything for its flaws, this NPC is not afraid to share how others might improve at their jobs.

TABLE1.NAME: ASTRONOMER
TABLE1.TEXT: Rarely seen during the day, this NPC spends most nights looking up at the stars, charting their movements.

TABLE2.NAME: CHASING A PEST
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is hunting a pest that has been plaguing them for several days. They need help!

CARD#76.SECRET: This NPC saw something very important recently concerning the PCs' current endeavors. They happily share the information if asked.
CARD#76.SECRETRULE: If H is 4+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: ATTENTIVE
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC pays close attention to their surroundings and can be counted on to remember details and useful facts.

TABLE1.NAME: SCHOLAR
TABLE1.TEXT: Carrying books and scrolls on various topics, this NPC is clearly on a quest for knowledge!

TABLE2.NAME: SINGING
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is quietly singing a song to themselves while doing some other chore or task.

CARD#77.SECRET: This NPC was once an active priest for a local faith, but they left after a scandal from their past resurfaced. They live a good life, hoping to make amends.
CARD#77.SECRETRULE: If H is 4, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: WISE
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is known for thinking things through, considering their options, and offering up good advice.

TABLE1.NAME: MIDWIFE
TABLE1.TEXT: Helping expecting mothers deliver their children, this NPC offers advice before and after birth as well.

TABLE2.NAME: TINKERING
TABLE2.TEXT: With tools in hand, this NPC is experimenting with a strange little device. What are they doing?

CARD#78.SECRET: This NPC is a member of the local thieves guild, and they are currently investigating this place for an upcoming job.
CARD#78.SECRETRULE: If H is 2, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: NIMBLE
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC moves with grace, easily dodging past obstacles to get where they are going.

TABLE1.NAME: CARTOGRAPHER
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC spends their days making maps for travelers. They even sell the occasional strange map or diagram.

TABLE2.NAME: PRAYER
TABLE2.TEXT: Reciting a quick litany to their faith, this NPC is in the middle of prayer.

CARD#79.SECRET: This NPC recently learned of the death of a distant relative who left them an estate. They would pay for someone to go investigate and report back.
CARD#79.SECRETRULE: If S is 3+ and H is 5, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: AGREEABLE
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is easy to get along with, happy to work with a reasonable requests or answer simple questions.

TABLE1.NAME: MERCENARY
TABLE1.TEXT: If you have a job, this NPC is more than happy to do it if the price is right. They have few moral boundaries.

TABLE2.NAME: MENDING
TABLE2.TEXT: With tools and supplies piled around them, this NPC is trying to fix a thing.

CARD#80.SECRET: Growing up in the gutters of a large city, this NPC never learned any manners. Worse still, someone from that old life is looking for them to settle a score.
CARD#80.SECRETRULE: If H is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: FOUL-MOUTHED
TRAIT.TEXT: Colorful language simply rolls off the tongue of this NPC. Most assume they are easy to anger and rude.

TABLE1.NAME: MERCENARY
TABLE1.TEXT: Willing to take on dangerous tasks, this NPC refuses to do anything against their moral code.

TABLE2.NAME: DROWNING SORROWS
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is having a few drinks to forget about the terrible day they have had.

CARD#81.SECRET: This NPC has been reborn countless times, retaining only glimpses of their past selves. It's a terrible curse to remember just a little about everything.
CARD#81.SECRETRULE: If S is 1 and H is 4, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: LEARNED
TRAIT.TEXT: With a surprising depth of knowledge, this NPC seems to have the answer to most common questions.

TABLE1.NAME: SQUIRE
TABLE1.TEXT: Constantly running errands for their knight, this NPC is training to become a skilled warrior.

TABLE2.NAME: LEAVING TOWN
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is packing up to leave town for good. They might be in a hurry, depending on the reason.

CARD#82.SECRET: This NPC brought something back from their travels that's actually quite dangerous. It will soon awaken, hatch, or otherwise activate.
CARD#82.SECRETRULE: If S is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: WORLDLY
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC has spent years traveling around the world, seeing all the sights. They have many stories to tell.

TABLE1.NAME: WATCH CAPTAIN
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is in charge of a local watch, responsible for keeping the community safe.

TABLE2.NAME: STANDING OUT
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is intentionally trying to draw attention to themselves for a specific reason.

CARD#83.SECRET: With dreams of thrilling quests and mountains of gold on their mind, this NPC wants to become an adventurer, and they ask the PCs for help.
CARD#83.SECRETRULE: If S is 5+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: ISOLATED
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC has spent all of their time in this vicinity, and they're fascinated by things and people from far away places.

TABLE1.NAME: BEGGAR
TABLE1.TEXT: With hat in hand, this NPC is just looking for a few coins to help them get by.

TABLE2.NAME: GOSSIPING
TABLE2.TEXT: Walking with a close friend, this NPC is sharing all the gossip they have heard in the past few days.

CARD#84.SECRET: Underneath their cool exterior, this NPC is actually hiding an entirely different secret. Draw another card and apply the secret to this NPC.
CARD#84.SECRETRULE: If S is 4, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: RELAXED
TRAIT.TEXT: It takes a lot of complications and frustrations to break this NPC's cool, calm demeanor.

TABLE1.NAME: ARGUING
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is in the middle of an argument with a customer or shopkeep.

TABLE2.NAME: BAKER
TABLE2.TEXT: Wearing an apron covered in flour, this NPC spends most of their time baking bread, cakes, and other tasty treats.

CARD#85.SECRET: This NPC has learned to use florid language to prevent their rural farm accent from being noticed.
CARD#85.SECRETRULE: If H is 0, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: FLORID
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC speaks in ornate, flowery language and is prone to lengthy diatribes about their exploits.

TABLE1.NAME: PROPHET
TABLE1.TEXT: Preaching from the street and offering up revelations, this NPC claims to be the voice of their deity.

TABLE2.NAME: READING
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is busy reading a book or maybe even going through a small pile of tomes.

CARD#86.SECRET: A close family member or friend of this NPC went off to become an adventurer and they were never heard from again.
CARD#86.SECRETRULE: If S is 4+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: INSULTING
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC specifically dislikes adventurers and they're not afraid to show it, insulting them at every turn.

TABLE1.NAME: VETERAN
TABLE1.TEXT: Bearing the scars of war, this NPC saw a fair amount of fighting in recent conflicts.

TABLE2.NAME: GIFT GIVING
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is handing out gifts in celebration of a holiday or other special event.

CARD#87.SECRET: This hopefulness is just a cover for this NPC's true motives. They are a spy from the Darklands, sent to learn about the surface for an upcoming invasion!
CARD#87.SECRETRULE: If S is 4 and H is 4, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: OPTIMISTIC
TRAIT.TEXT: No matter how dire the situation, this NPC always looks on the bright side and hopes for a better tomorrow.

TABLE1.NAME: VISITOR
TABLE1.TEXT: Here from a far away land, this NPC is exploring or looking to find a new home.

TABLE2.NAME: ENJOYING THE DAY
TABLE2.TEXT: Sitting outside, taking in the fresh air, this NPC is just having a pleasant day and doesn't want to be disturbed by annoying adventurers.

CARD#88.SECRET: Every year the town throws a birthday party for this NPC and it's coming up. They hate it every year.
CARD#88.SECRETRULE: If S is 2, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: NO FUN
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is in a foul mood and is easily irritated by jokes, commotion, and the antics of adventurers.

TABLE1.NAME: MONSTER HUNTER
TABLE1.TEXT: Decked out in specialized gear, this NPC is ready to go out and hunt monsters!

TABLE2.NAME: SETTING TRAPS
TABLE2.TEXT: Putting down small snares and traps, this NPC is attempting to catch a tiny creature.

CARD#89.SECRET: Long ago, this NPC was viciously mocked by the locals in a particularly cruel and mean-spirited prank.
CARD#89.SECRETRULE: If H is 3+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: SELFISH
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC shows little care or compassion toward anyone else. Their needs always come first.

TABLE1.NAME: KNAVE
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is a cheat, conning merchants and honest folk out of their gold with promises of even greater riches.

TABLE2.NAME: OFF TO CHURCH
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is making their way to the nearest temple or shrine to offer up prayers.

CARD#90.SECRET: Formerly part of a noble court, this NPC learned manners at a young age, but ran way before they were forced to take their title. They now live a simple life.
CARD#90.SECRETRULE: If H is 4, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: POLITE
TRAIT.TEXT: Always asking for permission and giving thanks, this NPC is particularly polite and mindful of others.

TABLE1.NAME: AUTHOR
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC spends their time spinning fantastic tales of daring, courtly love, and stirring drama.

TABLE2.NAME: SIGNING UP
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is waiting in line to sign up for an upcoming activity along with a number of others.

CARD#91.SECRET: Despite avoiding conflict, this NPC is surprisingly lucky. If ever they find themselves in danger, they always seem to come out unscathed.
CARD#91.SECRETRULE: If S is 2 and H is 2, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: COWARDLY
TRAIT.TEXT: There isn't a fight that this NPC won't flee from. They back down at the first sign of any adversity.

TABLE1.NAME: KNIGHT
TABLE1.TEXT: Sworn to uphold a code of values, this warrior is a beacon of valor and looked upon with respect.

TABLE2.NAME: VISITING NEIGHBORS
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is currently visiting with their neighbor, sharing gossip and idle talk.

CARD#92.SECRET: Even if things are terrible, this NPC wants things to remain as they are, primarily because they are benefitting in some meaningful way. Any change is met with hostility.
CARD#92.SECRETRULE: If H is 1, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: CONTENT
TRAIT.TEXT: While they have their concerns, this NPC is generally happy about the current state of affairs.

TABLE1.NAME: THIEF
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is an experienced thief here on an important job for their guild master.

TABLE2.NAME: LAUNDRY DAY
TABLE2.TEXT: Nothing is clean, so this NPC is either hanging clothes to dry or taking them to be washed.

CARD#93.SECRET: This NPC desperately wants to become a bard, focusing on comedy and pranks, maybe even hoping to one day become a royal jester, but there's just one problem. They're not very funny.
CARD#93.SECRETRULE: If S is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: PRANKSTER
TRAIT.TEXT: All of the locals know this NPC to be fond of pranks and jokes, but the PCs are not so fortunate.

TABLE1.NAME: INVENTOR
TABLE1.TEXT: When not in their steaming workshop, this NPC can be found all around town testing their newest invention.

TABLE2.NAME: INVENTORY
TABLE2.TEXT: With a scroll in hand, this NPC is carefully counting and cataloging items for their business or helping a friend.

CARD#94.SECRET: Unsurprisingly, this NPC is part of a gang that shakes down businesses for coin and demands payment from locals for protection.
CARD#94.SECRETRULE: If H is 2, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: AGGRESSIVE
TRAIT.TEXT: More than willing to yell, shout, and threaten, this NPC is not afraid of pushing others around to get their way.

TABLE1.NAME: SOLDIER
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is an active member of the nation's military forces, trained to use a variety of weapons.

TABLE2.NAME: QUITTING
TABLE2.TEXT: They've had enough and this NPC is in the middle of quitting their current job.

CARD#95.SECRET: A fiend has made contact with this character and is negotiating with them to perform some terrible deed. All that's left is to settle on a price.
CARD#95.SECRETRULE: If S is 5 and H is 1, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: CALCULATING
TRAIT.TEXT: Dispassionate and cold, this NPC evaluates everything before making any important decision.

TABLE1.NAME: CLERGY
TABLE1.TEXT: Annointed and blessed by the church, this NPC is a member of the local faith, ministering to those in need.

TABLE2.NAME: UNDER A SPELL
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is under the effects of a powerful spell that is causing them to behave oddly.

CARD#96.SECRET: This NPC has a surprise gift for one of the PCs, as thanks for their recent actions in helping the town.
CARD#96.SECRETRULE: If H is 2+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: THOUGHTFUL
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is kind and considerate, always saying thanks and going out of their way to mark special occasions.

TABLE1.NAME: HIGH PRIEST
TABLE1.TEXT: The leader of a local religious order, this NPC is a font of knowledge and wisdom.

TABLE2.NAME: RIDING LESSON
TABLE2.TEXT: Clearly in need of training, this NPC is trying to figure out how to properly ride a horse.

CARD#97.SECRET: This NPC is wanted in a neighboring nation for attempting to start a revolution against the local leaders. Their bounty continues to grow.
CARD#97.SECRETRULE: If S is 4+ and H is 4, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: REBELLIOUS
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC has no regard for rules or boundaries and does whatever they like. Change alignment to Chaotic.

TABLE1.NAME: DOOMSAYER
TABLE1.TEXT: Didn't you hear? The end is coming! Any day now, the world is going to end!

TABLE2.NAME: OUTSIDE CHORE
TABLE2.TEXT: There are a lot of things to get done and this NPC is in the middle of an important task.

CARD#98.SECRET: This NPC is going to be meeting their spouse's family for the first time today, and they're very nervous about it.
CARD#98.SECRETRULE: If H is 3, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: TENSE
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is under a lot of strain, and they're set off by the slightest challenge or unexpected turn.

TABLE1.NAME: SHOPKEEPER
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC has a store nearby where they sell a variety of useful goods to the locals.

TABLE2.NAME: ADVENTURERS NEEDED
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is looking for some adventurers to solve a problem.

CARD#99.SECRET: This NPC has grandiose dreams of true power, seeking to take over the town or maybe even the world. They're willing to do anything to make that happen.
CARD#99.SECRETRULE: If S is 6, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: AMBITIOUS
TRAIT.TEXT: With big ideas dancing through their head, this NPC is always striving for bigger and better things.

TABLE1.NAME: SHOPKEEPER
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC has a store nearby where they sell a variety of useful goods to adventurers.

TABLE2.NAME: DEAD
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is dead and there's a crowd forming around the body. What is the cause of death?

CARD#100.SECRET: Quite recently, this NPC tried to summon a fiend to deal with a rival, but now it has broken loose and is on a rampage. They need help killing it.
CARD#100.SECRETRULE: If S is 0 and H is 4+, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: CREATIVE
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC always has an innovative solution to problems, even if they're not always practical.

TABLE1.NAME: GUIDE
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC can take you to where you need to go and avoid any dangers along the way.

TABLE2.NAME: IN A FOG
TABLE2.TEXT: Wandering without any clear direction, this NPC is not paying attention to their surroundings.

CARD#101.SECRET: The locals like to assume this NPC is under some spell or hex that makes them slow, but despite all the rumors, they just run at their own pace.
CARD#101.SECRETRULE: If H is 1, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: SLOW
TRAIT.TEXT: Moving with measured speed and talking in a low, even tone, this NPC never does anything too hastily.

TABLE1.NAME: SURVIVOR
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC witnessed a pivotal moment in history and lived to tell the tale. They will never be the same.

TABLE2.NAME: GETTING WATER
TABLE2.TEXT: With bucket in hand, this NPC is getting water from the nearby well or river.

CARD#102.SECRET: This NPC works as the personal servant of a very powerful local, and they can often be found delivering messages or running errands, acting with the utmost discretion.
CARD#102.SECRETRULE: If S is 5, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: QUIET
TRAIT.TEXT: Speaking with a soft, but intense voice, this NPC is also silent in their actions.

TABLE1.NAME: FORTUNE TELLER
TABLE1.TEXT: With a Harrow deck in hand, this NPC can turn the cards and see into your future!

TABLE2.NAME: ON THE PROWL
TABLE2.TEXT: This NPC is looking for a new romantic partner, but they're very particular.

CARD#103.SECRET: In truth, this NPC is addicted to potions and elixirs that enhance their physical form. They are almost out of doses, though, and the withdrawal is terrifying.
CARD#103.SECRETRULE: If H is 2, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: FIT
TRAIT.TEXT: This NPC is clearly very hale and full of vigor. They're full of energy and excited to help with physical tasks.

TABLE1.NAME: SEEKING ADVENTURE
TABLE1.TEXT: This NPC is tired of their mundane life and wants to go be an adventurer.

CARD#104.SECRET: Awakened from 1,000 years of slumber, this immortal lich seeks to learn more about the world they hope to conquer!
CARD#104.SECRETRULE: If S is 6 and H is 6, apply the secret.

TRAIT.NAME: CURIOUS
TRAIT.TEXT: With a genuine interest, this NPC asks questions and investigates new things and experiences, eager to learn more.
